name: antigravity_inline_prompt

setup.description: Antigravity IDE is open with a fixture workspace and sample file

command: 현재 파일에서 TODO 주석을 찾아서 구현해줘
successPrompt: Verify that Antigravity became frontmost, inline prompt opened, the request was inserted, and after submit the task-start UI is visible. Look for: task banner, diff pane, streaming state, prompt close with running UI.
